_gsc_meta.description: Updated workspace terminal commands to invoke 'gsc ws <hash>' instead of manually spawning a shell with an init script.

terminals.iterm2: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to tell (create window with default profile) to tell current session to write text "cd \"%s\" && clear"'
terminals.iterm2-ws: osascript -e 'tell application "iTerm" to tell (create window with default profile) to tell current session to write text "gsc ws %s"'
terminals.terminal.app-ws: osascript -e 'tell application "Terminal" to do script "gsc ws %s"'
